category_sources: source_facts.description says it views Wikipedia pages from the terminal; official GitHub README says WIK is a command-line tool for viewing and searching Wikipedia from the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is WIK; source_facts.name is wik.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation, options, examples, and cache usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository, and the README installation section uses git clone https://github.com/yashsinghcodes/wik.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a terminal CLI; official GitHub README topics include python, cli, wikipedia, information, and python3.
